title: Double Frame Luxury Editorial Portrait AI
sourceTitle: Double Frame Luxury Editorial Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Photorealistic luxury editorial portrait of an elegant young adult woman with calm captivating expression inside a sophisticated double-frame composition with a floating inner frame. Subject: an elegant young adult woman with calm captivating expression has short glossy raven-black bob hair, luminous almond eyes, bronze eyeshadow, long natural lashes, and deep berry lips, wears an off-shoulder satin teal sweater with layered silver jewelry and delicate earrings, and leans gracefully against the inner frame with one hand near the chin. Scene: Dreamy evening bokeh field fading into dark navy tones, with translucent frame reflections and a calm contemporary fashion atmosphere. Composition: Fixed close-up portrait composition with a slim floating inner frame nested inside a larger translucent frame, the subject occupying most of the image, head turned slightly sideways, and layered depth around the face. Style: Authentic high-end fashion editorial photography with photorealistic skin texture, realistic hair strands, luxurious retouching, contemporary elegance, and cinematic shallow depth. Color Palette: Fixed rich emerald green, midnight blue, metallic silver, soft cyan reflections, satin teal, and deep berry lip accents. Lighting: Cinematic evening light with subtle rim light, soft face glow, silver-cyan reflections, and luxurious low-key contrast. Signature Elements: a sophisticated double-frame composition with a floating inner frame, glossy bob haircut, satin teal shoulder line, layered silver jewelry, luminous eyes, and dark emerald editorial atmosphere. Restrictions: Keep the face coherent, frame geometry clean, jewelry delicate, background uncluttered, text-free, and watermark-free.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
